steps.title: Identify the key detail about the batteries
steps.content: The passage describes batteries “that can't be easily taken out and swapped for new ones.” This tells us they're permanently integrated into the devices, not replaceable components. The blank needs a verb for what devices do with such batteries.

steps.title: Find the word that expresses this relationship
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean "hold inside" — devices have batteries that cannot be easily removed or swapped. Substitute each choice:
  • "contain": "devices contain batteries that can't be easily taken out" — contain means to hold something within, exactly describing integrated non-removable batteries. ✓
  • "prepare": "devices prepare batteries that can't be easily taken out" — prepare means to make ready; devices don't make batteries, they house them. ✗
  • "imagine": "devices imagine batteries that can't be easily taken out" — imagine means to picture mentally; physical hardware cannot imagine anything. ✗
  • "discover": "devices discover batteries that can't be easily taken out" — discover means to find something previously unknown, unrelated to housing batteries. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
